title: Gomesa salesopolitana

This epiphytic orchid is a member of the genus Gomesa, which is a group of orchids that are native to the tropical regions of South America. Gomesa salesopolitana is further classified as part of the subtribe Oncidiinae, which includes various species of orchids.
